overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The player drives through elevated highways, commercial districts with holographic billboards, and urban streets while following traffic and navigating intersections in a futuristic vehicle.

events.description: vehicle begins descending from elevated highway to street level
approaching intersection with green traffic light, preparing to turn

agents.ego_description: navigating wet highway conditions while following a silver sedan ahead, maintaining steady speed through light rain

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in same lane, maintaining consistent distance

entered.detail: orange safety railings lining the elevated highway edge
tall concrete walls separating highway lanes from buildings
tall street lamps illuminating the rainy highway

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway during a rainy night, following a silver sedan through wet conditions. The road is lined with orange safety railings and concrete barriers, with street lights cutting through the haze. The vehicle begins descending toward street level as it approaches an intersection.

events.description: exits highway and enters commercial street with large digital billboards
passing white van parked on left side of street

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial streets, making a right turn and proceeding past illuminated storefronts and digital displays

notable_agents.action: white van parked on the left side of the street near the curb

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement screen displaying commercial content
floating holographic sign with neon cyan and pink colors
modern glass facade building with interior lighting visible

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns right into a bustling commercial district filled with holographic advertisements and massive digital billboards. Neon lights reflect off the wet pavement as the car passes a parked white van and continues through the illuminated urban canyon.

events.description: driving onto bridge with white railings, city skyline visible in distance
entering underpass tunnel area with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: cruising across a bridge with white railings, observing the city skyline and waterfront before entering a darker underpass section

notable_agents.action: person holding umbrella walking along the bridge sidewalk

entered.detail: white concrete safety barriers lining both sides of the bridge
white concrete safety barriers lining both sides of the bridge
dark tunnel entrance with overhead lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The vehicle traverses a bridge with distinctive white railings, offering views of the city skyline through the rain. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks along the sidewalk. The scene transitions into a darker underpass tunnel with graffiti-covered walls and overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with ground-level shops

events.description: exiting tunnel into street-level commercial area with checkered shop facades
navigating around road construction cones in the lane

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through narrower urban streets, passing convenience stores and shops while avoiding construction obstacles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near shop entrance on the right sidewalk

entered.detail: storefront with distinctive black and white checkered pattern
concrete parking garage with multiple levels visible

segments.scene_description: Driving through a commercial street lined with convenience stores and checkered shop facades. The vehicle navigates past parked cars and construction cones while pedestrians walk along the wet sidewalks. A multi-story parking structure looms on the left as neon signs illuminate the rainy street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban alleyway leading to major intersection

events.description: entering darker alleyway section with graffiti-covered walls
approaching final intersection with green traffic light

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow urban alley with graffiti walls, approaching a crosswalk at a green light

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful street art and graffiti tags
metal security fencing along the right side of the road
yellow and white striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through a narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and chain-link fencing. The vehicle approaches a pedestrian crosswalk at a green traffic light, with the rain continuing to streak across the windshield. The urban environment feels more industrial and enclosed compared to the earlier commercial districts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle descends from a rainy elevated highway into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by following a silver sedan along a wet highway lined with orange safety railings and concrete barriers, with street lights piercing through the nocturnal haze. As the vehicle approaches an intersection, the camera smoothly descends from the overpass toward the street level. The scene then shifts as the car turns right, transitioning from the industrial highway into an illuminated urban canyon filled with massive holographic advertisements and digital billboards. Finally, the camera glides past a parked white van while the surrounding neon lights reflect vividly off the rain-soaked pavement.

The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from an open city bridge into the dense, enclosed corridors of an industrial urban district. It begins by traversing a bridge with white railings and views of the skyline through the rain, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella before diving into a dark, graffiti-covered underpass. As the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, the scene opens into a vibrant commercial street lined with checkered shop facades, neon signs, and a looming parking structure. The environment then shifts from these bright storefronts into a narrow, industrial alleyway characterized by chain-link fencing and weathered walls. Finally, the camera approaches a pedestrian crosswalk under a green light as rain continues to streak across the windshield.
